title: Long-shot recording of Zo doing complex task
description: Create a compelling time-lapse or long-form recording showing Zo autonomously completing a sophisticated multi-step task. Demonstrates real capability and builds trust through transparency.

title: Three standalone vignettes/capabilities
description: Develop three independent, self-contained demonstrations that can be spun up on a clean Zo instance without dependencies. Each showcases a different capability. Could offer all three as templates/starters for new signups.

title: Clean, polished Zo system showcase
description: The most impressive demo is showing the most impressive thing. Clean up current Zo instance to demonstrate a fully-realized, production-quality personal AI system. Shows what's possible when Zo is tuned and integrated into real workflows.

title: Demonstrate Zo as cognitive augmentation for in-the-moment presence
description: Show how a great Zo system enables being MORE present in meetings, not less. It's not about offloading attention—it's about cognitive augmentation that lets you 'spit game' and perform at your best. Zo handles the cognitive overhead so you can be fully engaged in the moment AND have everything captured for later. You're not overloading yourself, you're making yourself more capable both during and after interactions.
